desc: Phase 7 Command: Creates cross-section views through corridors.
summary: Phase 7 Command: Creates cross-section views through corridors. Two modes: - Single: User selects one corridor (host or linked model). - All: Automatically creates sections for all corridors (host + links). Uses ListCorridors.IsCorridor for corridor validation. Uses CreateSectionForCorridor helper for section creation. Uses ListCorridors.GetAllIncludingLinks for batch mode. Called by SheetSetUpCommand during automated sheet setup. Related: CreateRoomElevationViewsCommand for room elevations.
usecase: User wants to create a section through a corridor showing MEP services. User wants to batch-create sections for all corridors in the model.
notfor: Creating sections along gridlines (use CreateSectionFromGridlineCommand). Creating room elevations (use CreateRoomElevationViewsCommand). Creating sections through non-corridor rooms.
precondition: Active document must be open. At least one corridor room must exist (host or linked). For single mode: user must have interactive access to select elements.
postcondition: Cross-section view(s) created through corridor(s) using wall normal ray-casting. Sections are NOT placed on sheets (separate command).

selection_inputs.name: Corridor
selection_inputs.description: Corridor room to create section through
